label: Baseline
note: No training. Hardcoded thresholds. No reasoning.

label: Phase 1
note: Threat agent: loss 3.68→0.24 (93% reduction), accuracy 47.9%→94.7%. 8 agents trained individually via GRPO on Qwen2.5-7B/14B.

label: Phase 1.5
note: All 8 agents exposed to cross-domain scenarios. Reward range 0.45-0.62 with healthy variance showing active learning.

label: Phase 2
note: SarvaDrishti trained 400+ steps. Reward 0.921-0.947 (stable, consistent). Low variance (std ~0.003) indicates converged coordination policy.
